SEARCH
Package search

Class Barrel

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
search.Barrel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Remote, BarrelInterface
public class Barrel extends UnicastRemoteObject implements BarrelInterface
This class represents a barrel that stores indexed items and URLs. It implements the BarrelInterface and extends UnicastRemoteObject. It is used to communicate with the gateway and the client.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form
